package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"sync"
)

// scenario for goroutine_spawn_in_loop: Raw go statements launched from inside loops without obvious WaitGroup coordination.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: concurrency; severity: contextual.
func scenario223Negative(ctx context.Context, items []string) []int {
	results := make([]int, len(items))
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	wg.Add(len(items))
	for index, item := range items {
		index, item := index, item
		go func() {
			defer wg.Done()
			select {
			case <-ctx.Done():
				return
			default:
				results[index] = len(item)
			}
		}()
	}
	wg.Wait()
	return results
}
